species.citation: (L.) Wall. , Numer. List (1829) n. 1; ≡ Schizaea digitata (L.) Sw. , Syn. Fil. (Swartz) (1806) 150 ; Copel., FFP 1 (1958) 32; ≡ Acrostichum digitatum L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 1068.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Indian Ocean, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Singapore, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam.
